name: Dark Valkyria
name_jp: ダーク・ヴァルキリア
desc:
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the Graveyard. While this card is a Normal Monster on the field, you can Normal Summon it to have it become an Effect Monster with this effect.
● Once, while this card is face-up on the field: You can place 1 Spell Counter on it. This card gains 300 ATK for each Spell Counter on it. You can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy that target.
mnst_eff:

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
misc: Once while face-up on the field
